text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our senior-year summer has come. Despite
regional races on the horizon,
Matikanefukukitaru dives headfirst into summer
camp.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Summer has come once more. Oh, how the
cicadas cry—loud enough to shatter rocks. What
a sight to behold.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That should be no surprise. This year is nothing
like last year, when I struggled so much at the
completely-out-of-my-league Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I was so overcome with fear back then that even
your neutral expression looked as stony as a
Buddhist monk statue to me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That doesn't mean I'm about to let my guard
down. I'm still going to do what I planned to do!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's see. I'll steel my spirits under a waterfall,
practice Zen meditation, climb up a mountain and
blow a conch shell at the peak... Things like that.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And after that, I hope to drop by the rickety
penny candy store on the outskirts of town and
win me a candy raffle.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Once there's nothing more to do, I'll let luck take
the wheel! Or, as they say...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: "Do my best and let the gods do the rest."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it a little strange to wait for destiny to do its
thing? It just feels kinda passive...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Okay then, how does this sound? "Do my best to
leave the gods impressed!"

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna go out there and snatch all the luck I
can! Our training starts now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru breaks into a run underneath
the bright summer sky. I get the feeling this
summer is going to be exciting.
